text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I ran so much today, I could eat a cow!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Do you want to have a bit of my food, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I don't need that much.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Giving me your own food... You must be some
kind of angel, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Now, don't mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. No one looks happier when they're eating
than you, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Suzuka manages to stick to her diet
without having to try very hard at all.
